title: Fix create document from message loading lock
brief: Samuel provided video evidence from the Stage editor showing the Create document from message action in the Amelia/AI Compass side panel. After the action is clicked, the app switches to a hard full-screen loading spinner and does not complete normally in the recording. Fix the Stage frontend so this action successfully creates/opens the document or returns a visible recoverable error without breaking the editor session.

criteria.statement: Clicking Create document from message no longer leaves the editor on a full-screen loading state.
criteria.verification: A regression test or browser QA path exercises the create-document-from-message action and confirms loading is cleared on success or failure.

criteria.statement: The user either lands on the created document or sees a visible recoverable error while staying in a usable editor session.
criteria.verification: Implementation evidence shows success and error paths both clear pending state and do not trigger an indefinite page loader.

criteria.statement: The fix is scoped to the authorized create-document/message action path and does not change unrelated editor or document workflows.
criteria.verification: Git diff and independent review verify changes remain inside the allowed write scope.

criteria.statement: The repo's practical local quality checks pass, or any local environment gap is recorded.
criteria.verification: Attach test/build/lint evidence or a documented local exception.

coordination.messageTopology: Foreman-mediated handoff; Paperclip comments, run manifest, ledger events, and evidence files are the source of truth.
coordination.authorityDistribution: Foreman owns stage advancement, evidence checks, gate recording, No Mistakes, push, and PR commands.
coordination.syncMode: bounded async review with typed verdict files
coordination.aggregation: typed PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL/BLOCKED verdicts with evidence refs
coordination.termination: stop on PASS, budget exhaustion, or BLOCKED escalation
coordination.failureHandling: retry inside loop budget, then escalate without pretending success
coordination.informationPolicy: builder sees the frozen contract and video reproduction evidence; independent reviewers verify the diff and gate claims.
coordination.computeAccounting: record model/tool usage estimates as evidence, not billing truth

loop.judge: Claude Opus 4.8 max independent review after Codex build when available; otherwise record unavailable and run local independent review

loops.trigger: Immediately after the planning team returns a plan and before implementation starts, push back to the planning team exactly once and ask: Is there anything else that has been missed? Are there any errors? Are there any conflicts in the plan?
loops.judge: Foreman verifies the one planning-team challenge was sent once and the response or lack of response was recorded before implementation proceeds.
loops.memory: Ticket comments, Foreman loop event, run manifest, and evidence/source of truth for the planning-team response or lack of response.
loops.exitCondition: The one adversarial plan challenge is recorded with the planning team response or lack of response.
loops.escalation: If the challenge finds missed work, errors, or conflicts, return to the planning team for correction before implementation proceeds.

taskRoute.decision: This WorkOrder is explicitly routed to the main app stage repository under aila-quillio.
